title: Chaos PvP pack
description:
this is a pvp pack and also a support pack for chaos trader datapack and chaos apple datapack.
it can be use as a simple pvp pack and as a addon texture pack
version are from 1.16-latest
body:
This time I present you Chaos PvP pack.
This is a texture pack gives a simple texture for the armor,weapons and etc with glowing effect in minecraft
it's gives you new look and new and simple way of pvp armors.
this texture pack is made for support of 2 datapack 
Chaos Trader datapack
Chaos Apple
and also use as a simple netherite pvp pack.

 Optifine required
otherwise this pack doesn't work properly.

changes in minecraft after applying the pack.

changes are:-

1)Netherite Tools
2)Netherite Sword
3)Shield
4)Netherite Armor
5)Golden Apple
6)Enchanted Golden Apple
7)Totem
8)Trident
9)Bow
10)Elytra
11)All types of arrows

this pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16-1.20.1

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Chaos PvP Pack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
